name: Stop Pat Toomey
subject: Toomey's despicable attack ad against Katie (URGENT!)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)
---
**BREAKING: Pat Toomey launches TV ad attacking Katie 's record**
**[Katie needs your urgent support: FIGHT BACK NOW>](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)** Friend, **Pat Toomey is up on the Pennsylvania airwaves with his first ad maliciously attacking Katie 's record -- _just three days_ into the general election.**

Toomey has a $9 million war chest so we can bet this is only the beginning of what he'll spend to keep his Senate seat. We've upped our April fundraising goal to respond and fight back -- and it's absolutely critical we don't fall short.

[**Katie and our team need to raise $25,000 by midnight tomorrow to counter Toomey 's attack. Make an urgent donation of $5 or whatever you can afford now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)
---
**[RUSH $5 to help Katie fight back against Toomey>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)**
This is Toomey's first attack ad against Katie since she became the Democratic nominee -- and it's hot on the heels of other negative and deceitful ads from the Club for Growth and Chamber of Commerce.

Toomey and his special interest allies are going all in to defeat Katie. They know Toomey's vulnerable, and that winning Pennsylvania is our best chance to flip the Senate back to blue.

We need to show Toomey and his pals that if they come after Katie and our campaign, we won't back down -- it just encourages us to fight that much harder. [**Donate to Katie today so we can hit our April fundraising goal and show our opponents the strength of our grassroots campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Stop Pat Toomey
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/323340101708939264/-4148073642040754176?refcode=e20160429&refcode2=e20160429nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

name: Karl Rove
subject: State of the Race
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The race for the White House has dominated the media spotlight for some time now. But today, I want to draw your attention to a few races getting less national coverage: **the race for control of the U.S. Senate.**

This year, **Republicans have 24 seats up for re-election** in purple states. Democrats only 10.

GOP Senators like Kelly Ayotte in New Hampshire, Ron Johnson in Wisconsin, Pat Toomey in Pennsylvania, and Rob Portman in Ohio are just some of the Republicans defending their seats in battleground states this year.

Whether they win in November or not will have a tremendous impact on the future of conservative policies for decades, especially the direction of the Supreme Court.

No matter what happens with the presidential race, _**Republicans must maintain their Senate Majority**_.

[**Will you stand with our Republican Senators now by contributing $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085380:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)

**HOW DO WE WIN?**

Republicans now hold a Senate majority of 54 seats. _**Losing just four of these seats to the Democrats would cost us our majority.**_
Our only options are to unite or die. Conservatives must work together to defend our Republican Senate, or we will lose this election.

That is where grassroots conservatives like you come in. You understand what is at stake.

**Will you take action to defend our Republican Senate Majority?**

We only have _1 day left_ until our April deadline.

**TAKE ACTION NOW:**
[**Pitch in $25 immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085381:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
[**Pitch in $50 immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085382:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
[**Pitch in $100 immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085383:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
[**Pitch in $125 immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085384:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
[**Pitch in $200 immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085385:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
[**Pitch in another amount immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085386:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)

**Your support is essential to providing Republican Senate campaigns with vital ground resources.**

Expanding field offices, launching TV and radio ads, funding phone banks for volunteers to make Get-Out-the-Vote phone calls -- these are just a few of the ways your support will make a critical difference for Republicans in battleground races. [**Donate now to maximize your impact.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085387:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)

Republicans face tremendous challenges this cycle, but with your help, I know Republicans can unite, defeat Hillary Clinton and Senate Democrats, and preserve our GOP Senate majority.

Onward to victory,

Karl Rove

P.S. If you donate tonight, every dollar you give will be triple-matched by a generous group of our most loyal donors. Thank you again for all you do to support the Republican cause.

| [TRIPLE MATCH ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35085388:WceOujYNn:m:1:1320601823:785D2EADFA4DA819390A3980D8D3BDC5:r)
---

Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.NRSC.org
---

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: RE: Saturday
body:
we're just 80 days away from the GOP Convention and Oregon voters
are receiving their mail ballots this week.

Peter - we're just 80 days away
from the GOP Convention and Oregon voters are receiving their
mail ballots this week. It's critical that we continue gaining
delegates and sharing Gov. Kasich's message.
After all, 16 polls show that
he's the only Republican who stands a chance at defeating Hillary
Clinton.
We've almost hit our April
fundraising goal and need to raise another $22,750 by Saturday
evening. Can you help us out?
Thanks for your support!
-John

Sent from my iPad
--
From: John Kasich
To: John Weaver
Date: April 28, 2016
Subject: Saturday

John - we have a critical April
deadline on Saturday and it's the last opportunity to show the
strength of our organization before the upcoming primaries.
Will you consider chipping in to
help us raise the funds to support our *Oregon Ballot Fund* and
ensure that we win more delegates in the upcoming primary?

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

>> CHIP IN $250 <<

16 consecutive polls show I'm the
only Republican who can defeat Hillary Clinton. Ready to win?
Thank you for your ongoing
support!
John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

DONATE

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Update on Toomey's attack ad
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey there, **we emailed a few hours ago to let you know Pat Toomey has gone up on the airwaves attacking Katie.** It's absolutely nasty, and we need to respond ASAP.

[**Right now: Make an urgent donation to Katie today so we can hold Toomey accountable for his despicable negative attack ad against Katie**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8972505385097232384/4283227810350235648?refcode=e20160429.2&refcode2=e20160429.2nd&amount=25).

Since this morning, we've seen an outpouring of grassroots support for Katie. Democrats are chipping in to help Katie fight back against Toomey's attack and show that mudslinging won't stop us -- it just makes us fight even harder.

Katie's got a big April fundraising deadline tomorrow, she's counting on your support now. **Donate here:[www.KatieMcGinty.com/Toomey-Ad-Response](https://act.myngp.com/el/8972505385097232384/4283227810350235648?refcode=e20160429.2&refcode2=e20160429.2nd&amount=25)**.

Many thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

name: Rob Portman
subject: did you get my message?
clean_body: | Peter -- Did you get my email on Monday? Let me update you in case you did not receive it. Earlier this week, Senator Harry Reid's Super PAC announced that they are spending $1,000,000 on misleading TV ads attacking me across Ohio in the next two weeks. Last week, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) announced that they will spend at least $10,000,000 against me this fall. Peter, I must fight back. That’s why I am reaching out for your help today. I have $18,902 left to raise for this month’s online fundraising goal. before tomorrow at midnight? "Donate Here!" "Donate Here!" "Donate Here!" "Donate Here!" "Donate Here!" "Donate Any Amount!" Please let me know if you are able to help. I have a strict deadline tomorrow that I must meet! Thank you so much for your generosity, Peter! You can donate by using this link: "Donate Here!" All best, Rob "Donate Here!" -=-=-

Our race is already ranked as one of the most competitive in the country -- and Toomey and his special interest allies are running scared:
* **Two major GOP groups have already gone up with six figures in ad buys slamming Katie and distorting Toomey's record **
* **Just this morning Toomey launched his first ad attacking Katie \-- and it's up and running on PA airwaves**

We've got to do absolutely everything we can to go up against Toomey and his allies and win back the Senate for Democrats. Right now, Katie needs your help to hit her ambitious **$25,000 April fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow**

Thanks,

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: "I will be with Bernie as long as he is willing to fight"
body:
#
I want you to read this note, sisters and brothers. It's one of thousands we've received from people who have contributed to our campaign this week urging Bernie to keep fighting for every vote and for every delegate all the way through the convention:
_" I am a teacher and Bernie is the only candidate that is truly fighting for all of us. No other candidate has his platform of universal health care, a $15 minimum wage, and the rebuilding of our infrastructure. I will be with Bernie as long as he is willing to fight!" _\- Melissa from Massachusetts
We have an important FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow and the entire corporate media and political establishment will be looking to see just how many of Bernie's supporters are willing to keep fighting for the issues that have powered this campaign from the start. That's why we have to ask:
[**If everyone who have signed up to support Bernie chipped in $2.70 before our FEC deadline, that would send a powerful message that you will never stop fighting for the values we share and ensure we have the resources we need to fight for every vote through the convention.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full")
Here are some more powerful stories we received from donors this week:
Heather from North Carolina wrote, _" I am a 42 year old woman with stage IV breast cancer and I want to leave the world a better place for my three children. I believe Bernie is the man to lead us towards a better future for all, not just a few."_
Anne from Ohio added, _" I believe in Bernie and he represents my values and political policies. I will continue to support him and this political revolution. Thank you for giving us all a voice."_
And Avid from Utah made a contribution along with this note. _" I have been actively phone banking and contributing almost daily for Bernie. Please do NOT give up the fight. Bernie is an inspiration and is giving hope to me and my family!"_
[**Add your $2.70 contribution to Heather, Anne, and Avid 's before tomorrow night and we are going to win a lot of delegates through the remainder of this campaign while sending an unmistakable message that our political revolution will never stop fighting for the values we share. **](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full")
Bernie is going to keep fighting to win every vote and every delegate, not just because that's the only way to win a nomination, but because if we continue to stand together we can transform the Democratic Party and take our country back from the billionaire class.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-stories?refcode=em160429-s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: I want you to read this note, sisters and brothers. It's one of thousands we've received from people who have contributed to our campaign this week urging Bernie to keep fighting for every vote and for every delegate all the way through the convention: " I am a teacher and Bernie is the only candidate that is truly fighting for all of us. No other candidate has his platform of universal health care, a $15 minimum wage, and the rebuilding of our infrastructure. I will be with Bernie as long as he is willing to fight!" \- Melissa from Massachusetts We have an important FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow and the entire corporate media and political establishment will be looking to see just how many of Bernie's supporters are willing to keep fighting for the issues that have powered this campaign from the start. That's why we have to ask: "" Here are some more powerful stories we received from donors this week: Heather from North Carolina wrote, " I am a 42 year old woman with stage IV breast cancer and I want to leave the world a better place for my three children. I believe Bernie is the man to lead us towards a better future for all, not just a few." Anne from Ohio added, " I believe in Bernie and he represents my values and political policies. I will continue to support him and this political revolution. Thank you for giving us all a voice." And Avid from Utah made a contribution along with this note. " I have been actively phone banking and contributing almost daily for Bernie. Please do NOT give up the fight. Bernie is an inspiration and is giving hope to me and my family!" "" Bernie is going to keep fighting to win every vote and every delegate, not just because that's the only way to win a nomination, but because if we continue to stand together we can transform the Democratic Party and take our country back from the billionaire class. In solidarity, Jeff Weaver Campaign Manager Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Lenee Kruse, RussFeingold.com
subject: These two numbers
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
These two numbers have been on my mind. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d40/1389567149/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema") Friend, My job is all about the numbers, and there are two that have been weighing on my mind this week: 44 million, and 12,892. 44 million, because the Koch brothers have spent a whopping $44 million in Wisconsin since 2010. And $12,892, because that's how far we are from our end-of-month goal. **[Now it's your turn to pick a number. Whether it's a contribution of $5, $25, or more, we need your help right away to reach our crucial $50,000 goal by midnight tomorrow.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d40/1389567149/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d41/1389567149/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d7e/1389567149/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d7f/1389567149/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d7c/1389567149/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
We're up against the Koch brothers and a slew of undisclosed dark money, and we won't be able to get Russ to the Senate unless we keep our pace -- and that means reaching each and every one of our important fundraising goals.
Our grassroots team is the heart and soul of this campaign, and we couldn't do any of this work without you.
Thank you,
Lenee Kruse
Finance Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4267/1c469400/52b941d/3561d40/1389567149/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-29_EOM-lk_nd&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Joe Sestak
subject: thank you
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198ed/3476a20e/da9dddc/274244c8/1050393033/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, What I most valued in this recent campaign were my supporters throughout Pennsylvania. I know that time is precious in our busy lives, but if you have a moment in yours to spare, I will be at Sweet Creams Cafe located at 429 Main St in Stroudsburg at 12:00 pm this Tuesday, May 3, so I might say "thank you" to you personally. Please know I recognize you may well have other commitments, but I cannot let the campaign end without my coming back to each locale whose supporters meant so much to me. Thank you for your belief in me, and I hope to say the same to you on Tuesday!
Warmly, Joe
---

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198ed/3476a20e/da9dddc/274244f7/1050393033/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198ed/3476a20e/da9dddc/274244f6/1050393033/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/joesestak")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Fwd: A Woman Card just for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
We just had to extend the offer | Friend --

Wow! So many of you wanted your very own Woman Card that we just had to extend the offer -- chip in now to get yours! [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**We’ll run out of cards soon -- don’t miss your chance to get one:**

[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Mini

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: HillaryClinton.com
Subject: A Woman Card just for you

Friend --

Donald Trump has been saying the “woman's card” is all Hillary has going for her -- I just loved Hillary’s response: “If fighting for women’s health care and paid family leave and equal pay is playing the ‘woman card,’ then deal me in.”

Apparently other people did, too. We've been hearing from supporters all over the country that they'd like a “woman card” of their very own -- to display proudly on a fridge or pull out of their wallet every time they run into someone who says women who support Hillary must not be using our brains (that's a real thing Donald Trump’s senior adviser said yesterday).

[**Chip in $1, and we’ll send you your very own Official Hillary for America Woman Card.**
](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) We're only making a limited number of these, so don’t miss your chance to get one. **Chip in $1 right now, and you’ll be able to play the woman card anytime you want:**
[ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Mini

Mini Timmaraju
Women's Outreach Director
Hillary for America

P.S. The best part of these cards? Every dollar will make sure Donald Trump never becomes president. [**Get yours now.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzNzQzMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=Nzg0NjMwNTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Everything that's happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carly for Vice President |
body:
| | |

[](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZrKY2ONCz5WngxflQe4WQ)

### Friend,
It's certainly been an eventful week!

As one of my top supporters, I hope you're as excited as I am about the weeks to come, as Ted and I fight to win this nomination.

**I also thought you might be interested in seeing everything that's been happening since I agreed to join Ted's ticket as his running mate.**

See below!

Carly

* * *

### WHAT'S HAPPENING:
**NATIONAL REVIEW:[ "The Story Behind the Cruz-Carly Alliance"](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZrWuo7SWNX8tqjltjkjSN) ** _"Call it a Hail Mary, or a Hail Carly. With no chance of winning the Republican nomination before the convention in Cleveland and with the odds of a contested convention growing dimmer, Ted Cruz announced Carly Fiorina as his potential running mate Wednesday afternoon."_ [Read More](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1Zs80JqYh2OkzA5rAMqyOK)
**RED STATE:[ "EXCELLENT: Ted Cruz Announces Carly Fiorina As VP Candidate"](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1Zsv3q38VwwILTDDPID2GE) ** _"Senator Ted Cruz announced Carly Fiorina as his pick for his Vice Presidential nominee on Wednesday afternoon, shifting the narrative away from Trump's "big" foreign policy speech. The campaign also revealed the new logo and website for the pair's general election campaign, should there be one. Opinion alert: This was a great event, Carly is a great pick, and this is all great news."_ [Read More](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZsGzLmefLnUS3pJXbJhCB)
**NATIONAL REVIEW:[ "Carly Fiorina Is a Guided Missile Aimed Right at Donald Trump"](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZsS66FjA0f6YdbQ4EPwyy) ** _"Ted Cruz 's vice presidential pick is mostly about beating Donald Trump. Cruz can't be president unless he beats Trump, and in choosing Fiorina he chose last fall's most effective (and sometimes only) Trump-fighter."_ [Read More](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1Zt3CrYoUf6j4mXWc7VLuv)
**THE NEW YORK TIMES:[ "Carly Fiorina Pulls Out All the Stops, and Lyrics, in Joining Ted Cruz"](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1Ztf8NhuetXvawK2jB20qs) ** _"Freshly printed signs, with both last names. Singing from the stage. The earnest use of the word " elan" at a rollicking political rally."_ [Read More](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZtqF8AzyIOHgGw8r48fmp)
**CNN:[ "Ted Cruz names Carly Fiorina as VP pick"](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZtCbtTESXFTmQieyxeuim) ** _"Ted Cruz formally named Carly Fiorina as his vice presidential running mate Wednesday -- a last-ditch move to regain momentum after being mathematically eliminated from winning the GOP presidential nomination outright."_ [Read More](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZtNHPcKdcx5t04kG0kJej)

### BEHIND THE SCENES:

### WHAT THEY'RE SAYING:

**@ScottWalker**
> _.@CarlyFiorina is an accomplished executive and a strong leader who will help reignite America's promise.
>
> .@CarlyFiorina is an effective messenger against the Left & will expose @HillaryClinton's hypocrisy & failed agenda. _

**Jeb Bush**
> _"I'm impressed with her. Picking a candidate that is talented, tough -- she takes on Trump really well, I think, and she takes on Hillary Clinton very well, as well. (She's) someone who's got a proven record, who's been vetted by a candidate, I thought it was a smart move."_

**@jack_welch** _
> Carly Fiorina is a magnificent speaker...best of everyone to date...content A, delivery A, just smart_

**@AmandaCarpenter** _
> Props to Carly. She stepped up, has been campaigning hard to stop Trump instead of going into hiding like other candidates. She's a fighter
>
> So many other Republicans have surrendered to the idea of Trump. She wouldn't. Thank you Carly!!!_

**@LindseyGrahamSC** _
> @CarlyFiorina is a capable and talented individual. She will be a good running mate for @TedCruz._

Plenty more still to come!

**Carly**
---

| Paid for by Carly for Vice President |
---|---
Click [**here**](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZtZeavPxrohz9QqNtqYag) if you would prefer to not receive future emails concerning Cruz for President.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1ZuaKvOURGftFjCwUWxd6d) if you would prefer to not receive future emails concerning Cruz for President. Click [here](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/u/1aGI9DtQnmmWVxDQHZwM) if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Carly for Vice President.
clean_body: | | | Friend, It's certainly been an eventful week! As one of my top supporters, I hope you're as excited as I am about the weeks to come, as Ted and I fight to win this nomination. I also thought you might be interested in seeing everything that's been happening since I agreed to join Ted's ticket as his running mate. See below! Carly WHAT'S HAPPENING: NATIONAL REVIEW: "Call it a Hail Mary, or a Hail Carly. With no chance of winning the Republican nomination before the convention in Cleveland and with the odds of a contested convention growing dimmer, Ted Cruz announced Carly Fiorina as his potential running mate Wednesday afternoon." RED STATE: "Senator Ted Cruz announced Carly Fiorina as his pick for his Vice Presidential nominee on Wednesday afternoon, shifting the narrative away from Trump's "big" foreign policy speech. The campaign also revealed the new logo and website for the pair's general election campaign, should there be one. Opinion alert: This was a great event, Carly is a great pick, and this is all great news." NATIONAL REVIEW: "Ted Cruz 's vice presidential pick is mostly about beating Donald Trump. Cruz can't be president unless he beats Trump, and in choosing Fiorina he chose last fall's most effective (and sometimes only) Trump-fighter." THE NEW YORK TIMES: "Freshly printed signs, with both last names. Singing from the stage. The earnest use of the word " elan" at a rollicking political rally." CNN: "Ted Cruz formally named Carly Fiorina as his vice presidential running mate Wednesday -- a last-ditch move to regain momentum after being mathematically eliminated from winning the GOP presidential nomination outright." BEHIND THE SCENES: WHAT THEY'RE SAYING: @ScottWalker .@CarlyFiorina is an accomplished executive and a strong leader who will help reignite America's promise. .@CarlyFiorina is an effective messenger against the Left & will expose @HillaryClinton's hypocrisy & failed agenda. Jeb Bush "I'm impressed with her. Picking a candidate that is talented, tough -- she takes on Trump really well, I think, and she takes on Hillary Clinton very well, as well. (She's) someone who's got a proven record, who's been vetted by a candidate, I thought it was a smart move." @jackwelch Carly Fiorina is a magnificent speaker...best of everyone to date...content A, delivery A, just smart @AmandaCarpenter Props to Carly. She stepped up, has been campaigning hard to stop Trump instead of going into hiding like other candidates. She's a fighter So many other Republicans have surrendered to the idea of Trump. She wouldn't. Thank you Carly!!! @LindseyGrahamSC @CarlyFiorina is a capable and talented individual. She will be a good running mate for @TedCruz._ Plenty more still to come! Carly** | Paid for by Carly for Vice President | ---|--- Click if you would prefer to not receive future emails concerning Cruz for President.
